# ProcessReporter v1.7.3

## Highlights

- Restored immediate Presence updates for application launch, system wake, focused application changes, and media playback changes instead of waiting for the periodic heartbeat.
- Started Discord, Slack, and MixSpace deliveries concurrently so a slow or failing destination no longer delays the initial delivery to healthy destinations.

## Fixes and reliability

- Removed the blocking media refresh from the reporting path while retaining provider-driven media updates.
- Bounded Slack rate-limit waiting and request timeouts so an unavailable Slack integration cannot stall a reporting batch for an entire interval.
- Unified local History and destination timestamps around the time the Presence was observed.
- Delivered History change notifications on the main thread to prevent background publication warnings in the interface.

## Update notes

- This release supports Apple Silicon (arm64) only.
